text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Again... I lost again...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Why do I keep losing? I know I did everything I
could...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Is full power not enough? Am I just...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Ugh... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I-it's... all over for me...
choice_data_list: It's not over for you, Ticket!
Are you going to let it end here?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wh-why?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I mean, look at how many times I've lost now!
choice_data_list: But I believe you'll win the next one! I believe in you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: WAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Slap!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ow... Th-that hurt! I slapped myself too hard!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It's okay! It's what I deserve!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You believe in me, but all I've been is
wishy-washy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No more! I slapped it out of me, so I'm good now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I've gotta live up to how you see me. And next time, I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep going at this, again and again, until I
smash through this wall!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Ahh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: N-no way! I CAN'T stop now!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I mean, I haven't given everyone enough
excitement yet!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So... so... It can't be over yet! I can't let it end like
this!
choice_data_list: In that case, let's wipe those tears away.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You gotta tell me! How do I stop this losing
streak?
choice_data_list: We'll get stronger, by working together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah, you're right. That's the only way!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'm gonna do my best. And the next time
I cry...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: They'll be tears of happiness after I win the race!
